name: Chili Frijoles Negro
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans in a saucepot with water to cover, over a moderate flame.
2. Bring to a boil, simmer for 3 minutes, remove from heat, cover, and let stand for 60 minutes.
3. Drain, rinse with cold water, and drain well.
4. Sprinkle salt over the beans, add water to cover, and place over a moderate flame.
5. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 2-3 hours, until tender (adding water as needed to keep beans covered). Remove from heat, set aside.
6. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven, over a medium flame.
7. Add the onions and bell peppers, heat and stir for 5-6 minutes.
8. Add the ground beef, heat and stir for 5-6 minutes, until all of the redness disappears.
9. Add the beans in liquid and the remaining ingredients.
10. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 60-90 minutes.
11. Season to taste with additional salt and pepper.
12. Serve hot.
